case_title: RETAILERS NATIONAL BANK VS. DOROTHY MCCLAIN et al

docket_entries.description: PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2003, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-19-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE OCT-10-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RETAILERS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLAIN, DOROTHY DOES 1 TO 15,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-10-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-11-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-25-2003
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF RETAILERS NATIONAL BANK SERVED JUL-26-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCCLAIN, DOROTHY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF
